data.summary: We'll be celebrating Blue Archive's 0.5-Year Anniversary of Blue Archive in May, and we have various
data.body:
We'll be celebrating Blue Archive's 0.5-Year Anniversary of Blue Archive in May, and we have various events prepared for all Senseis!
View the details in the event page!

⬇️Check 0.5-Year Anniversary Festival⬇️
